iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"matrikkelenbygning","purpose":"get buildings in Kristiansand (filter by kommunenummer from step 1)"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"stormflohavniva","purpose":"get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) limited to avoid unfiltered large query"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"flomsoner","purpose":"get 200-year flood polygons (flomareal with gjentaksintervall=200) limited to municipality when possible"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce storm-surge polygons to municipality extent (intersect step 1 & step 3)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce flood polygons to municipality extent (intersect step 1 & step 4)"},{"step":7,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons (step 2 x step 5)"},{"step":8,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find buildings from step 7 that also intersect flood polygons (step 7 x step 6)"},{"step":9,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"collapse to one row per bygningid (distinct buildings)"},{"step":10,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort buildings by bygningid ascending"},{"step":11,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"limit to 10 buildings"}]}
